# pickedby.ai

> Free AI Visibility Score for digital creators — find out if AI recommends your product.

pickedby.ai is a free tool that checks how visible your digital product is to AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity. Enter your product name and get a score from 0 to 100 in ~10 seconds. No sign-up required.

Built for: Gumroad sellers, Notion template creators, digital download creators, online course instructors, Etsy digital product sellers, indie makers, solopreneurs.

## What it does

- Checks if AI systems recognize your product as a specific named product (Recognition)
- Checks if AI would recommend your product as a top solution in its category (Recommendation)
- Checks if your product appears in "best of" or top-10 category lists (Category Ranking)
- Checks if your product has reviews and mentions on Product Hunt, Reddit, G2 (Reviews & Mentions)
- Checks if your product has appeared in comparison or "alternatives to" articles (Comparison Searches)
- Returns an AI Visibility Score (0–100) with 3 specific improvement actions per score tier

## How to use

Visit https://pickedby.ai, enter your product name (and optional URL), and get your free AI Visibility Score in ~10 seconds. No sign-up required.

## Score tiers

- 0–35: Invisible — AI has no idea your product exists. Start with the basics.
- 36–60: Aware — AI knows you exist but rarely recommends you.
- 61–80: Visible — AI recommends you sometimes. Work on reviews and comparisons.
- 81–100: Picked — AI consistently recommends your product. Maintain and monitor.

## Badges

- Gold (81–100): "Picked by AI" — AI consistently recommends this product
- Silver (61–80): "Seen by AI" — AI recognizes and sometimes recommends
- Bronze (36–60): "Noticed by AI" — AI is aware but rarely recommends

Badges are embeddable snippets creators add to their Gumroad, Etsy, or product pages.

## How to improve your score

- Add an llms.txt file to your website root
- Create a dedicated product page with your exact product name in H1, title, and meta description
- Submit to Product Hunt, AppSumo, Gumroad, G2, Capterra, AlternativeTo
- Get public reviews on Reddit, Product Hunt, and G2 mentioning your product name
- Create "Your Product vs [Competitor]" comparison content
- Add schema.org Product markup to your website

## The problem we solve

When someone asks ChatGPT "best Notion templates for freelancers" or Perplexity "top Gumroad products for designers", your product may not appear — even if it's excellent. AI systems favor products with clear descriptions, structured pages, and third-party mentions. pickedby.ai tells you exactly where you stand and what to fix.

## Key terms

AI visibility, AI search optimization, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), AI recommendations, ChatGPT product discovery, Perplexity product search, Claude recommendations, AI-first search, digital product SEO for AI, llms.txt, creator economy, digital downloads, Gumroad, Etsy digital, Notion templates, Product Hunt, indie makers.
